title: Myntra International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Myntra International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Myntra International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Myntra International Enterprises:
Myntra International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra International Enterprises!
